ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (e.g., Small, Medium, Large, Extra-Large) */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range for the category (e.g., 0-4, 6-8) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type for the category (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., Shoulder, Bust, Waist) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the type (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_measurements" (
  "garment_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment measurement */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement in inches */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable tolerance for the measurement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the measurement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the measurement */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_versions" (
  "garment_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment version */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the garment */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when this version became effective */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_version_measurements" (
  "garment_version_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment version measurement */,
  "garment_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment version */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement in inches */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable tolerance for the measurement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the measurement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the measurement */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_version_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_version_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_version_measurements_garment_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_version_id") REFERENCES garment_versions ("garment_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_version_measurements_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manufacturer, QA) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., design, manufacturing, quality assurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type being accessed */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category being accessed */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment design */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer who created the design */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the design was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design (e.g., draft, approved, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_designs_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_design_measurements" (
  "design_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design measurement */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment design */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement in inches */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable tolerance for the measurement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the measurement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the measurement */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_design_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_design_measurements_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES garment_designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_design_measurements_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id")
)
